overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a deserted industrial waterfront. The character passes wooden shacks and concrete structures with views of metal truss bridges spanning a calm river under hazy, overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront sidewalk with wooden shacks

events.description: character raises arm and aims a weapon toward the wooden shacks on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past dark wooden industrial shacks, briefly aiming a weapon

entered.detail: dark weathered wooden structures with corrugated metal roofs lining the sidewalk
two-lane paved road with white lane markings
grey metal electrical equipment box on the sidewalk edge
tall metal street lamp along the roadside
industrial metal truss bridge spanning the river in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial sidewalk bordered by wooden shacks on the left and a road on the right. The atmosphere is hazy and overcast. Around 7.5 seconds, the character briefly raises a weapon to aim at the shacks before continuing forward as distant bridges become visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with river view

events.description: view opens up revealing the river and multiple metal truss bridges in the distance
approaching concrete stairs leading down to the water's edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront walkway with clear views of the industrial bridges across the calm river

entered.detail: calm grey water of the industrial river
weathered concrete steps leading down from the sidewalk to the water level
grey concrete wall separating the walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal a wide waterfront view with the river and industrial bridges becoming prominent. The character passes the last of the wooden shacks and approaches a set of concrete stairs descending to the water. The environment remains deserted with the hazy skyline visible across the river.

events.description: turns right to follow the concrete barrier wall separating the walkway from the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete barrier with the river immediately to the left and the road to the right

entered.detail: solid grey concrete parapet wall running along the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns to follow a concrete barrier wall that runs parallel to the river, providing an unobstructed view of the water and the distant industrial bridges. The road continues on the right side while the river flows calmly on the left, maintaining the desolate industrial atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate industrial waterfront that gradually opens from a narrow corridor into a wide river vista. It begins with the character walking a narrow sidewalk bordered by wooden shacks under a hazy, overcast sky, briefly raising a weapon toward the structures before moving forward. As the character passes the final shacks, the scene expands to reveal a broad view of the river and prominent industrial bridges emerging through the haze. The camera then follows the character toward a set of concrete stairs descending to the water before shifting to track along a concrete barrier wall. This final movement provides an unobstructed view of the calm river and distant bridges, maintaining a desolate atmosphere as the road continues to the right.
